sources.label: China CDC Weekly
sources.description: Monthly notifiable infectious disease reports published by China CDC.

sources.label: National Disease Control and Prevention Administration
sources.description: Official China public health bulletin and query portal.

sources.label: PubMed
sources.description: Biomedical literature discovery feed used as supplementary context.

source_info.notes: CDC NNDSS weekly provisional data, bootstrapped for national TOTAL ingestion

sources.label: US CDC NNDSS
sources.description: CDC National Notifiable Diseases Surveillance System provisional data.
